# The Everything AI

> AI-powered platform for mental health therapy, business insights, and learning — featuring AI chat & voice therapists, human therapist booking, business analytics, and experimental AI tools.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of all services and platform highlights.
- [AI Therapy](/ai-therapy): AI chatbot, voice therapist, and human therapist booking.
- [Insight Fusion](/insight-fusion): Business analytics and strategy sessions.
- [AI Learning](/ai-learning): Curated AI educational materials and resources.
- [Experiments](/experiments): Experimental AI tools including the Resume Brandifier.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI, mental health, and technology.
- [Therapist Registration](/therapist-registration): Apply to join as a licensed therapist.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
